name: v1.0.14 Adversarial Round 3 Bug Fixes
goal: Fix 2 bugs: inverted has_session semantics in resume_session, and broken test referencing nonexistent _GRADER_DEBUG_LOG attribute

tasks.name: Fix resume_session inverted has_session semantics
tasks.description: Revert condition at line 2932 from 'if self.tmux.has_session(target):' to 'if not self.tmux.has_session(target):' and remove kill_session call (dead session needs no killing). Matches spawn_worker pattern at line 1984. No tests required: production bug fix matching established tested pattern.

steps.description: Fix the condition and remove dead kill_session call at lines 2932-2934
Run orchestrator tests to verify no regressions

tasks.name: Extract _GRADER_DEBUG_LOG constant and fix debug log test
tasks.description: Add _GRADER_DEBUG_LOG constant to orchestrator_mcp.py, replace 4 hardcoded paths, and fix test to monkeypatch both _GRADER_DEBUG and _GRADER_DEBUG_LOG. No separate RED/GREEN cycle: the test IS the thing being fixed.

steps.expected: All 4 open() calls use the constant

steps.description: Fix test: add monkeypatch.setattr for _GRADER_DEBUG=True alongside existing _GRADER_DEBUG_LOG patch
